overview: West-Site Rental is a complete rental management app for West-Site Boardshop. Employees can manage inventory, generate QR codes, and track active rentals. Customers can browse available gear, fill in a detailed reservation form, view full pricing tables, and calculate rental costs — all in Dutch.
features: Full reservation form with personal details, gear selection, duration tiers, and measurements
Complete pricing tables for all rental categories (snowboards, boots, bindings, splitboards, skate, surf)
Rental duration calculator with tier-based pricing (Dag/Weekend/Shortski/Week/2 weken)
Employee dashboard for inventory management with QR code generation
Role-based access with separate flows for employees and customers
Real-time availability checking by date range
